topic: premium luminous 3D animated feature-film, true 3D depth, cinematic camera angles, volumetric light, little tiny dust motes, soft depth of field, expr
summary: The user requested a 2x2 grid of 4 panels for a premium luminous 3D animated feature-film scene in PixVerse, depicting a hawk in comical distress carrying a scroll (from `@image7`). The scene requires true 3D depth, cinematic camera angles, volumetric light, dust motes, soft/true depth of field focusing on foreground characters, expressive 3D eyes, and a 4K animated movie look. It features merchants from `@image6` (plus an indigo-robed beduin) and stern, grumpy guards looking up, with a low-angle POV towards the hawk (from `@image3`). Director Theo acknowledged the "hilarious comical distress dynamic action scene" and confirmed the output format. A critical clarification is needed for the "gate and wall background," as `@image6` (`beduin merchant full size.png`) is a character sheet and `merchants in a line before the gate.png` (SVG) was unusable. The user must provide a dedicated visual reference (`@image`) for the city gate and wall; Theo will generate additional merchants in the style of `@image6` if no other references are given. Confirmed references for prompt structuring are `@image2`, `@image3`, and `@image7`.
